Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class FactTable

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.FactTable
public class FactTable extends Object
The FactTable helper class aids in the export of database-style Fact Tables. If you have a "table" where each row is a fact or lookup table where a value should be referenced by an ID, you can add these keys and facts to this table and get back the ID.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FactTable()
    Create a FactTable with an ID that starts at 1 and increments with each new key/fact.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    addFact(String key, String fact)
    Adds a new key/fact combination to the table and returns the ID.
    String
    getFactById(Integer id)
    Get the fact for a given key.
    String
    getFactByKey(String key)
    Get the fact for a given key.
    int
    getFactId(String key)
    Get the ID for a fact by a key.
    void
    setHeader(String header)
    Set the column headers of the fact table.
    void
    setNextId(int id)
    Set the next ID.
    void
    write(Writer writer)
    Write the contents of the FactTable to a file.

  • Constructor Details

    • FactTable

      public FactTable()
      Create a FactTable with an ID that starts at 1 and increments with each new key/fact.

  • Method Details

    • setNextId

      public void setNextId(int id)
      Set the next ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The value of the next ID.

    • setHeader

      public void setHeader(String header)
      Set the column headers of the fact table.
      Parameters:
      header - Column headers of the fact table.

    • getFactId

      public int getFactId(String key)
      Get the ID for a fact by a key.
      Parameters:
      key - The key for a fact. For example, 'M' or 'F'.
      Returns:
      The ID for the fact. For example, 1 or 2.

    • getFactByKey

      public String getFactByKey(String key)
      Get the fact for a given key.
      Parameters:
      key - The key for a fact. For example, 'M' or 'F'.
      Returns:
      The fact. For example, 'Male' or 'Female'.

    • getFactById

      public String getFactById(Integer id)
      Get the fact for a given key.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID for the fact. For example, 1 or 2.
      Returns:
      The fact. For example, 'Male' or 'Female'.

    • addFact

      public int addFact(String key, String fact)
      Adds a new key/fact combination to the table and returns the ID. If the key already exists, the appropriate ID is returned without modifying the table.
      Parameters:
      key - The key for a fact. For example, 'M' or 'F'.
      fact - The fact. For example, 'Male' or 'Female'.
      Returns:
      The ID for the fact. For example, 1 or 2.

    • write

      public void write(Writer writer) throws IOException
      Write the contents of the FactTable to a file.
      Parameters:
      writer - The open Writer to use to record the FactTable.
      Throws:
      IOException - On errors.
